name: fleettime
description: Personal time tracker for Fleet AI task-writing, feedback, and QA workflows

scripts.build:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && cp electron/main/widget.html electron/main/widget.js dist-electron/main/
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.test: npm run build:electron && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron test/durations.test.js && node test/fleetUrls.test.mjs
